who: medical billing teams in small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month
offer: For medical billing teams in small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month, manual reconciliation causes delayed payments. We automate the reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: reconciliation of patient records and insurance claims
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 medical billing teams with demo
Community forums where medical billing teams share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for patient records
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
